The '''SonoMax 100''' was a [[sonic rifle]] created by the arms manufacturer [[SonoMax]]. The rifle had two firing modes, a sonic blast and a sonic stun. They were used by the [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] of the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] due to the limited property damage they caused. The [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Var'Rotha Fin'Rotha]] also used a SonoMax 100.

==Description==
The SonoMax 100 sound rifle was a [[sonic rifle]] capable of holding sixty shots worth of ammunition. The weapon could be fired in two modes, the first of which released a cone shaped sonic blast that at point blank range spanned half a [[Meter/Legends|meters]], but spread to three meters wide at its maximum width over the rifle's thirty meter range. The second mode released a debilitating sonic wail which stunned targets, although the frequency of the wail had to be recalibrated to affect different species due to their different physiologies.<ref name="HSatCS" /> The weapons design included a grip located underneath the body of the weapon.<ref name="GFT:PG">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>

==History==
The SonoMax 100 sound rifle was a weapon designed for riot control by its makers, the arms manufacture [[SonoMax]]. The rifles were used by the [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], as the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] technically owned everything located within the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], and so preferred the use of weapons that caused no property damage. Members of the Security Police were not affected by the wail setting of the gun at all, as their [[Armor/Legends|helmets]] had integral sound-proofing. Despite the SonoMax 100 not being available for public sale,<ref name="HSatCS" /> the [[Tolanese]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Var'Rotha Fin'Rotha]] used one when he attacked [[The Broken Tusk (Reuss VIII)|the Broken Tusk]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Reuss VI]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="WHoSaV">''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The SonoMax 100 was first shown in the ''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'', a supplement written by [[Michael Allen Horne]] and released in [[1993]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]]. It then appeared in two later sourcebooks for the game, ''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'', in which it received an illustration by [[Tim Eldred]], and ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'' both of which were released in [[1997]].
